0:{"rsc":["$","$1","c",{"children":[[["$","h1",null,{"children":"Hermes Plugin"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"First-class integration with the Hermes agent framework."}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"Installation"}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"code":"hermes plugin install mnemosyne\n","language":"bash"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":["Or add to ",["$","code",null,{"children":"hermes.yaml"}],":"]}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"code":"plugins:\n- name: mnemosyne\n  source: pip\n  config:\n    db_path: ./memory.db\n    embedding_model: text-embedding-3-small\n    auto_context: true\n    context_injection:\n      enabled: true\n      max_memories: 5\n      min_relevance: 0.7\n","language":"yaml"}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"Auto-Context Injection"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"When enabled, Mnemosyne automatically injects relevant memories into agent context:"}],"\n",["$","$L3",null,{"chart":"\nflowchart LR\n  U[User Input] -->|query| M[Mnemosyne]\n  M -->|recall| C[Context Assembly]\n  C -->|inject| A[Agent Prompt]\n  A -->|respond| R[Response]\n  R -->|remember| M\n"}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"Plugin Hooks"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"Mnemosyne registers the following Hermes hooks:"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":["| Hook | Timing | Action |\n|------|--------|--------|\n| ",["$","code",null,{"children":"pre_prompt"}]," | Before LLM call | Inject relevant memories |\n| ",["$","code",null,{"children":"post_response"}]," | After LLM call | Store conversation |\n| ",["$","code",null,{"children":"tool_call"}]," | After tool execution | Store tool results |\n| ",["$","code",null,{"children":"shutdown"}]," | Agent shutdown | Run sleep consolidation |"]}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"Tool Schema"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"Mnemosyne exposes these tools to agents:"}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"code":"{\n\"name\": \"remember\",\n\"description\": \"Store information in long-term memory\",\n\"parameters\": {\n  \"content\": { \"type\": \"string\", \"description\": \"Information to store\" },\n  \"tags\": { \"type\": \"array\", \"items\": { \"type\": \"string\" } },\n  \"importance\": { \"type\": \"number\", \"minimum\": 0, \"maximum\": 1 }\n}\n}\n\n{\n\"name\": \"recall\",\n\"description\": \"Retrieve relevant memories\",\n\"parameters\": {\n  \"query\": { \"type\": \"string\" },\n  \"top_k\": { \"type\": \"integer\", \"default\": 5 }\n}\n}\n\n{\n\"name\": \"add_fact\",\n\"description\": \"Store a structured fact\",\n\"parameters\": {\n  \"subject\": { \"type\": \"string\" },\n  \"predicate\": { \"type\": \"string\" },\n  \"object\": { \"type\": \"string\" }\n}\n}\n\n{\n\"name\": \"query_facts\",\n\"description\": \"Query the knowledge graph\",\n\"parameters\": {\n  \"subject\": { \"type\": \"string\" },\n  \"predicate\": { \"type\": \"string\" }\n}\n}\n","language":"json"}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"Configuration Options"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":["| Option | Default | Description |\n|--------|---------|-------------|\n| ",["$","code",null,{"children":"auto_context"}]," | ",["$","code",null,{"children":"true"}]," | Inject memories into prompts |\n| ",["$","code",null,{"children":"context_injection.max_memories"}]," | ",["$","code",null,{"children":"5"}]," | Memories per injection |\n| ",["$","code",null,{"children":"context_injection.min_relevance"}]," | ",["$","code",null,{"children":"0.7"}]," | Minimum score to include |\n| ",["$","code",null,{"children":"store_conversations"}]," | ",["$","code",null,{"children":"true"}]," | Save conversation history |\n| ",["$","code",null,{"children":"store_tool_results"}]," | ",["$","code",null,{"children":"true"}]," | Save tool outputs |"]}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"Troubleshooting"}],"\n",["$","h3",null,{"children":"Plugin not loading"}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"code":"hermes plugin list\n# Verify mnemosyne appears\n\nhermes plugin logs mnemosyne\n# Check for errors\n","language":"bash"}],"\n",["$","h3",null,{"children":"Context not injected"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":["Verify ",["$","code",null,{"children":"auto_context"}]," is enabled and memories exist:"]}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"code":"hermes config get plugins.mnemosyne.auto_context\nhermes memory stats\n","language":"bash"}],"\n","$L4"],["$L5","$L6","$L7","$L8","$L9","$La","$Lb","$Lc","$Ld","$Le"],"$Lf"]}],"isPartial":false,"staleTime":300,"varyParams":null,"buildId":"QQSqVRZ0L1fJQFST1lZ0f"}
4:["$","div",null,{"className":"callout callout-info","children":["$","div",null,{"className":"flex items-start gap-3","children":[["$","$L10",null,{"iconNode":[["circle",{"cx":"12","cy":"12","r":"10","key":"1mglay"}],["path",{"d":"M12 16v-4","key":"1dtifu"}],["path",{"d":"M12 8h.01","key":"e9boi3"}]],"className":"lucide-info shrink-0 mt-0.5","size":18}],["$","div",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"className":"block mb-1","children":"Hermes Version"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"text-sm leading-relaxed","children":["$","p",null,{"children":"Requires Hermes v2.0 or higher.
